message:
refactor: Rename MockSource→TestFdSource, MockIo→TestIo across tests (bd-1z5u)

Continues the no-mock naming policy by renaming test doubles:

- MockSource → TestFdSource in io_driver.rs, reactor/lab.rs,
  reactor/registration.rs, builder.rs, lab/runtime.rs
  (test-only fd source for reactor registration tests)
- MockIo → TestIo in net/websocket/split.rs
  (in-memory AsyncRead/AsyncWrite for split tests)

No behavioral changes — naming-only refactor for consistency with the
deterministic test double naming convention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
